bio: A seeker and diplomat, translating cultures, ideas, and inner worlds while exploring the evolving dimensions of life

Born in Istanbul in 1975. He received his undergraduate degree in Cinema-TV from Marmara University, Faculty of Fine Arts, and his master’s degree in Cinema-TV from Istanbul Bilgi University. Since his student years, he has been interested in experimental film and video. His works in this field have been screened at national and international film festivals and exhibitions.

He completed his first feature film *Sivil* in 2012. With the support of the New Film Fund, he made a short documentary film titled *Horse Stories*, which was screened at the Viscult Visual Anthropology and Documentary Film Festival.

His second feature film ''Ali's Nature'', focusing on the relationship between ecology and tradition, was screened at 40 international film festivals and won 30 awards in various categories. He has taught courses and organized workshops at universities and various educational institutions.
Hello. I am an Independent Screenwriter/Storyteller. I have written various stories of different genres. Feel free to contact so that we can discuss the stories in a very prolific manner.

bio:
"K.M. Mathew is an established film producer and the founder of New Darsan Creations. A retired Sub-Inspector from the Excise Department (Government of Kerala), he brings a legacy of discipline, integrity, and administrative excellence to the media industry.

Under his leadership, New Darsan Creations produced the notable Malayalam feature film 'Malayalakkara Residency', a high-value comedy-drama featuring a stellar ensemble of National Award winners and veteran artists. Now integrated into the Crayons Bridge RD 360 Ecosystem, New Darsan Creations is focused on scaling its library for global digital distribution and AI-enhanced cinematic experiences. K.M. Mathew’s transition from a decorated government service career to a content creator exemplifies the bridge between traditional values and modern technology."

🌟 T M Productions 🌟
🎬 Crafting Stories, Creating Magic 🎥

Based in the vibrant city of Kochin, Kerala, T M Productions is a dynamic film production company passionate about bringing captivating stories to life. With a team of creative visionaries and technical experts, we strive to deliver high-quality content that resonates with audiences worldwide.
